source.body_text_sample:

Contact Us
We're Building Something Real

Our Team is Building the Future, Remotely and On-Site

We’re engineers, gamer geeks, aviation nerds, and drone enthusiasts. The individuals who are building the future here have travelled many paths - but what we all have in common is the ability to thrive on change; a desire to work at something meaningful; and an unquenchable need to invent the future in our own image. This is Kongsberg Geospatial.


Current Job Listings

We Build Meaningful Technology


Kongsberg Geospatial creates real-time geospatial technology that powers life-protecting defense systems and unmanned aerial systems worldwide - systems that do such things as deliver defibrillators to people in need and help search and rescue operations in the Arctic.

People rely on our technology for a wide range of applications including air defense, search and rescue, drone delivery systems, and autonomous vehicle tracking.

Our team members make a real impact in people's lives.


We’re expanding our team, and we’re looking for people who want to leave their mark on the world.
‍


Take Control of Your Work Environment

Our team members have the opportunity for real input into product direction. Our engineers enjoy technical autonomy and get to design the software they build. We create high-performance technology with real-world applications. Join us, and make a difference.


Kongsberg Geospatial is a fully owned subsidiary of Kongs
